name: Glorious Morning Cheesy Bacon Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease muffin tin well.
3. In a large bowl, combine oats, flour, sugar, baking powder, and seasonings; set aside.
4. In another bowl, combine oil, egg substitute, and skim milk.
5. Make a well in the center of the dry mixture.
6. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just moistened.
7. Gently fold in bacon and cheese.
8. Portion muffin batter evenly into prepared muffin tin (about 1/3 cup).
9. Bake for about 20-25 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
